g.text: constant/padding: constant or padding bytes, entropy below 1.0 bits/by
low: low-variety structured data, entropy 1.0 to 5.0 bits/byte
medium: moderately varied data, entropy 5.0 to 7.2 bits/byte
high/random: compressed, encrypted or random-looking bytes, entropy 7.
dim: low-confidence window (fewer than the minimum sampled bytes) — sh
